name: VideoAmp
description: Cross-screen TV measurement and attribution currency platform for linear, CTV and digital video advertising.

seo.title: VideoAmp — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: VideoAmp: Cross-screen TV measurement and attribution currency platform for linear, CTV and digital video advertising.

when_to_use: Cross-screen measurement currency for linear + CTV ad buys
Deduplicated reach attribution across digital video and TV
Audience-based TV campaign measurement and reconciliation

pros: Cross-screen TV measurement and currency positioning
Covers linear, CTV and digital video
Accepted by major broadcasters and agencies
cons: Mobile app attribution not its focus
Requires integration across TV data partners
Complex to operate without an agency partner
review.verdict: Legitimate TV currency play for big brands and agencies, but largely irrelevant for mobile-first advertisers.
review.best_for: Large brands and agencies trading linear plus CTV with alternative-currency measurement.
review.not_for: Mobile app UA teams that need install-level attribution on a self-serve budget.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
